compiled_state.title: Add epic-closure validator to completion-verifier.md (entry/exit hooks, ordering before compaction)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Overview
Insert the epic-closure entry and exit validator invocation blocks into completion-verifier.md. Makes T9's RED tests pass. The epic-closure validator MUST serialize before Story 5's compaction step (ordering contract from 0263-62ba). Entry reads upstream commit PRECONDITIONS; exit writes epic-closure PRECONDITIONS event before compaction runs.

## File Impact
- Modify: plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md

## Implementation Notes
**Entry section** — insert at the start of the Procedure section (before Step 1: Load the Ticket):

```bash
# Epic-closure stage-boundary preconditions entry check (Story 4)
# Source path resolved via CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT — never use literal plugins/dso/
_CV_PLUGIN_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"
source "${_CV_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/lib/preconditions-validator-lib.sh" 2>/dev/null || true
_dso_pv_entry_check "epic-closure" "commit" "${EPIC_ID}" || true
# Fail-open: diagnostic emitted; verifier proceeds
```

**Exit section** — insert in Step 6 (Output Verdict), immediately before any compaction-trigger reference. This enforces the ordering contract: validator writes PRECONDITIONS BEFORE compaction runs (per 0263-62ba pinned contract).

```bash
# Epic-closure stage-boundary preconditions exit write (Story 4)
# ORDERING CONTRACT: this MUST appear before any compaction trigger in this agent
_dso_pv_exit_write "epic-closure" "${_UPSTREAM_EVENT_ID:-}" "${SPEC_HASH:-}" "${EPIC_ID}" || true
```

COORDINATION NOTE: Story 5 (0263-62ba) also modifies this agent for the compaction step. The validator write (this task) and the compaction trigger (Story 5's task) both touch completion-verifier.md. The validator exit write MUST appear before the compaction trigger in the file. Test T9's test_epic_closure_validator_precedes_compaction enforces this line-order contract.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 5 tests from T9 PASS after this edit
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-preconditions-epic-closure-validator.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL | grep -q "pass\|ok\|PASS"
- [ ] Entry section references _dso_pv_entry_check with "epic-closure" and "commit"
  Verify: grep -q '_dso_pv_entry_check.*epic-closure.*commit\|_dso_pv_entry_check.*"epic-closure"' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] Exit section references _dso_pv_exit_write with "epic-closure"
  Verify: grep -q '_dso_pv_exit_write.*epic-closure' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md
- [ ] Validator exit write appears before any compaction trigger in the file
  Verify: VLINE=$(grep -n '_dso_pv_exit_write' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md | head -1 | cut -d: -f1); CLINE=$(grep -n 'compaction\|SNAPSHOT\|compact' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md | head -1 | cut -d: -f1); [ -n "$VLINE" ] && ([ -z "$CLINE" ] || [ "$VLINE" -lt "$CLINE" ])
- [ ] No literal plugins/dso/ path in the modification
  Verify: ! grep -n 'plugins/dso/' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/agents/completion-verifier.md | grep -v "shim-exempt\|portability-ok" | grep -q '_dso_pv'
- [ ] validate.sh --ci passes
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci

## Retry Budget
MAX_ATTEMPTS: 3 (sonnet model)
On 3 consecutive sonnet failures: escalate to opus with full diagnostic context
On 3 consecutive opus failures (6 total): escalate to user
If MAX_AGENTS: 0 at sonnet→opus escalation time: skip opus step, escalate to user immediately
